package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_load_optional_config: Layer: Lazy loading. Flag optional configuration or metadata loaded at startup before any feature uses it.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule555NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario555Negative(records []Rule555NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
